name: TransDigm Group INC
business: TransDigm is a leading global designer, producer and supplier of highly engineered aircraft components critical to the safe and effective operation of nearly all commercial and military aircraft worldwide. Approximately 90% of its fiscal 2025 net sales were generated by proprietary products, and about 55% came from aftermarket sales. The company serves a diversified customer base including distributors, airlines, OEMs, defense agencies, and system suppliers, with no single customer accounting for more than 10% of net sales.

exposures.sentence: TD Group, through its wholly-owned subsidiary, TransDigm Inc., is a leading global designer, producer and supplier of highly engineered aircraft components that are critical to the safe and effective operation of nearly all commercial and military aircraft worldwide.

We predominantly serve customers in the commercial, regional, business jet and general aviation aftermarket, which generally account for 30% to 35% of our annual net sales; the commercial aerospace OEM market, comprising large commercial transport manufacturers and regional and business jet manufacturers, which generally account for 25% to 30% of our annual net sales; and the defense market (which includes defense OEMs and aftermarket sales to the U.S. and friendly foreign governments), which generally account for approximately 35% to 40% of our annual net sales.
Major product offerings include ... mechanical/electromechanical actuators and controls for space applications ... from the Non-aviation segment.
Major product offerings include ... advanced sensor products ... from the Power & Control segment.
Major product offerings include mechanical/electromechanical actuators and controls ... from the Power & Control segment.
Major product offerings include ... turbine controls for the energy and oil and gas markets ... from the Non-aviation segment.
Major product offerings include ... refueling systems for heavy equipment used in mining ... from the Non-aviation segment.
Major product offerings include ... refueling systems for heavy equipment used in ... construction ... from the Non-aviation segment.
Major product offerings include ... turbine controls for the energy and oil and gas markets ... from the Non-aviation segment.
Major product offerings include ... engineered audio, radio and antenna systems ... from the Airframe segment.
Major product offerings include seat belts and safety restraints for ground transportation applications ... from the Non-aviation segment.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Simmonds Precision Products from RTX Corporation for $757 million
catalysts.sentence: On October 6, 2025, the Company completed the acquisition of all the outstanding stock of the Simmonds Precision Products, Inc. Business ( Simmonds ) of Goodrich Corporation from RTX Corporation for approximately $757 million in cash.

catalysts.event: Board authorized additional $5,000 million in share repurchases
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, the Board of Directors authorized an additional $5,000 million in share repurchases of common stock permissible under the Company s existing stock repurchase program, subject to any restrictions specified in the Credit Agreement and indentures governing the existing Subordinated and Secured Notes.
